name: @clickclack/desktop
author: OpenClaw contributors
description: Native ClickClack desktop shell for macOS, Windows, and Linux

scripts.dist:linux: pnpm build && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --x64 --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:win: pnpm build && electron-builder --win nsis zip --x64 --publish never
